llm_verdict.message:
<tool_call>
{"name": "review_plan", "arguments": {"plan_description": "Remediate OpenSCAP finding sysctl_net_ipv4_conf_all_rp_filter by: 1) Check current runtime status of net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter using sysctl -n net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter, 2) Set the parameter at runtime using sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter=1, 3) Comment out any existing conflicting net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter entries in all sysctl.d files (/etc/sysctl.d/*.conf, /run/sysctl.d/*.conf, /usr/local/lib/sysctl.d/*.conf) using sed -i 's/^[\s]*net\\.ipv4\\.conf\\.all\\.rp_filter[\s]*=.*$/# \\0/' with --follow-symlinks flag, 4) Create a new persistent configuration at /etc/sysctl.d/99-rp-filter.conf with content 'net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter = 1' and proper permissions (644), 5) Handle the systemd-sysctl symlink case by skipping /etc/sysctl.conf symlink as specified in the original script, 6) Verify the setting is applied both at runtime and after applying the configuration."}}
</tool_call>
